evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that weather conditions (temperature, precipitation, wind) are auto-captured. While the linked use case mentions that weather is 'auto-logged: 68°F, clear', it does not provide evidence that the system captures all required weather conditions, specifically precipitation and wind. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not confirm that all aspects of the requirement are met.
gaps: No evidence that precipitation and wind conditions are captured.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
